tokenColors.name: Preprocessor - C/C++ Macro Name (defined symbol after #define)
Macro - C/C++ Macro Usage (ALL_CAPS convention, invocation)
Class - C# Interface Name (starts with I convention)
Class - C# Type Used (referenced in code)
Class - Lua (no native class; metatable name placeholders)
Variable - Python Instance / Class Field (self.x / cls.x)
Type - C++ STL / Standard Library Types (std::vector, std::string, etc.)
Operator - Python Comparison (==, !=, <, >, is, in, not in)
Generic - C# Generic Type Argument < T >
Generic - Python Type Hint (x: int, -> None, Optional, List[T])
